svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart TD Start["connectAsync() called"] CheckCB{{"Callback
provided?"}} CheckConn{{"Already
connected?"}} CheckLib{{"dgraph-js-http
loaded?"}} Connect["Create ClientStub + Client"] Auth{{"AuthToken
provided?"}} SetAuth["setAlphaAuthToken()"] Done["callback(null, client)"] ErrCB["Log error, use no-op callback"] ErrConn["Log error, return existing client"] ErrLib["Log error, return"] Start --> CheckCB CheckCB -->|No| ErrCB CheckCB -->|Yes| CheckConn ErrCB --> CheckConn CheckConn -->|Yes| ErrConn CheckConn -->|No| CheckLib CheckLib -->|No| ErrLib CheckLib -->|Yes| Connect Connect --> Auth Auth -->|Yes| SetAuth Auth -->|No| Done SetAuth --> Done style ErrCB fill:#f8f0e0 style ErrConn fill:#f8f0e0 style ErrLib fill:#f8e0e0 style Done fill:#e0f8e0 ","style":"notebook"}
